# LEAPPs

> Free, open-source digital forensics tools for practitioners worldwide. The LEAPP family parses logs, events, plists, and app data from iOS, Android, ISP warrant returns, and vehicle systems, producing readable reports plus LAVA projects for interactive review. Created by Alexis Brignoni and maintained by a global community.

## Tools

- [iLEAPP](https://github.com/abrignoni/iLEAPP): iOS/iPadOS Logs, Events, and Plists Parser — parses iTunes backups and full file system extractions
- [ALEAPP](https://github.com/abrignoni/ALEAPP): Android Logs, Events, and Protobuf Parser — parses adb backups and full file system extractions
- [RLEAPP](https://github.com/abrignoni/RLEAPP): Returns, Logs, Events, and Properties Parser — parses ISP/provider warrant returns (Google, Meta, Snap, and more)
- [VLEAPP](https://github.com/abrignoni/VLEAPP): Vehicle Logs, Events, and Properties Parser — parses vehicle system extractions
- [LAVA](https://github.com/leapps-org/LAVA-releases): LEAPP Artifact Viewer App — desktop viewer for exploring reports generated by any LEAPP tool
- [Batch LEAPP](https://github.com/abrignoni/batch-leapp): runs any LEAPP tool across a whole folder of extractions with one report index, SHA-256 manifest, GUI and CLI

## Install

macOS (Homebrew tap: leapps-org/leapps):

    brew tap leapps-org/leapps
    brew install ileapp              # CLI — or aleapp / rleapp / vleapp
    brew install --cask ileapp-gui   # GUI app — or aleapp-gui / rleapp-gui / vleapp-gui / lava

Windows: pre-built executables on each tool's GitHub releases page. From source: Python 3.12+, `pip install -r requirements.txt`, then `python iLEAPP.py -t <fs|tar|zip|gz> -i <input> -o <output>`.

## Key pages

- [Releases](https://leapps.org/releases): latest downloads for every tool, with install commands
- [Quick start](https://leapps.org/docs): pick a tool, run an extraction, read the report
- [Artifact search](https://leapps.org/artifacts): searchable index of every artifact parser across the tools
- [Blog](https://leapps.org/blog): artifact research, tool updates, and how-to guides ([RSS](https://leapps-api.4n6-198.workers.dev/blog/feed))
- [Stats](https://leapps.org/stats): live download counts, stars, and contributor data
- [Scoreboard](https://leapps.org/scoreboard): community contributor rankings

## Community

- [GitHub](https://github.com/abrignoni): all repositories; contributions welcome via pull request
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/XaZaknENUR): community chat and support
- [How to write a module](https://leapps.org/blog-post?post=2026-06-14-how-to-write-an-ileapp-module): guide to contributing an artifact parser
- License: MIT. All tools are free — there is nothing to buy.
